title: Migrate to Bootstrap 5 JavaScript and CSS
description:
Upgrade the application from the existing Bootstrap version to Bootstrap 5 to leverage the updated JS components and custom CSS theme.

## Requirements
- Add Bootstrap 5 JS to `SELECT.JS`
- Add Bootstrap 5 JS and link `/css/bootstrap.min.css` to the `login.php` page
- Enables use of the custom Bootstrap CSS theme already uploaded to the server
acceptance_criteria: Bootstrap 5 JS is loaded on SELECT.JS
Bootstrap 5 JS and CSS are loaded on login.php
Existing UI components continue to function with Bootstrap 5
Custom bootstrap.min.css theme is properly linked
ux_changes: Upgrades the frontend framework to Bootstrap 5, enabling updated component styling and behavior across select.php and login.php pages.
implementation_notes: Straightforward JS/CSS include changes on two PHP pages. Custom Bootstrap CSS was pre-uploaded.
